title: Scoped personal access tokens are now generally available
body:
You can now scope personal access tokens (PATs) to specific API operations, restricting tokens to only the permissions you specify. For a complete list of available scopes, see [API scopes](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/api/scopes). To learn more, see [Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)](/aws/en/dev-tools/auth/pat).

Scoped personal access tokens are coming soon to workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled.

ref_links.text: Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)
